content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.72%, Bank Nifty -0.79%, VIX +2.08% to 18.68 — risk-off tape with Realty/Banking weak, but pockets of strong idiosyncratic earnings momentum (BHEL, LALPATHLAB, TATATECH, LAURUSLABS, BANDHANBNK, ADANIPORTS, HAL all gapping up on Q4 results). Mixed picture: index weak, individual breakouts strong. Keep risk tight, focus on managing held book first.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +6.3%. Current SL 1029 is already above entry (locked-in gain) and ~2% below CMP 1049.70 — within trail-gap discipline. Stock consolidating near pivot 1051.97, R1 at 1069.58. Q4 PAT +19% YoY supports thesis. Keeping SL/target unchanged — holding the established trail. Net change: NO CHANGE — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1029 already locks in ~+4.5% gain, sits ~2% below CMP — proper trail gap. Target 1110 intact. No-op MODIFY would be wasted signal. Continue to hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -2.6%, SL 119 still ~2.3% below CMP 121.65. Gold thesis intact (geopolitical risk premium, central bank buying), domestic gold at record highs per research. MACD bearish near-term but ETF tracks physical gold which is structurally bid. Hold to SL or recovery."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock hit ATH 1757.40, now at 1739.50 (+2.3% from entry). SL at 1710 already locks in +0.6%. CMP-to-SL gap = 1.7% which is borderline tight. NOT raising SL further — current 1710 is appropriate trail (within 1% rule borderline). No-op on values — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 1710 sits 1.7% below CMP 1739.50 — meets trail-gap discipline. Q4 strong (revenue +26%, PAT growth, record cargo 500 MMT), dividend Rs 7.5/share, ATH momentum. Let it run toward 1820 target. No SL change to avoid forced exit on intraday chop."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -2.7%, SL 13400 sits just 0.3% below CMP 13435 — uncomfortably tight, but already past entry-stop pre-commitment. April record sales (+33% YoY) thesis intact; Q4 PAT -6.9% bond MTM hit is the drag. Position is at risk of stopping out today on noise; not loosening SL (rejected by guardrail anyway). Hold to SL or rebound."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 204.00,
      "new_target": 220.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -2.0%, SL 204 sits at CMP — on top of price. Cannot loosen. Will convert to HOLD. Q4 PAT +68% YoY, GNPA improving — thesis intact but tape weak (Banking -0.79%). At risk of intraday stopout."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 204 essentially at CMP 204.95 — flush. Cannot tighten further (would force exit) and cannot loosen (guardrail rejects). Q4 turnaround strong (+68% PAT, GNPA -140 bps). Hold; if SL trips, accept the small loss as designed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "new_target": 4900.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.5% (CMP 4640.50 vs entry 4575). SL at entry 4575 = breakeven, sits 1.4% below CMP — within trail-gap rule. Strong defence sector momentum, order book Rs 2.54 lakh cr, new CMD with execution track record. Will not tighten further to avoid forced exit on noise. No-op on MODIFY values — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 4575 = entry (breakeven trail), sits 1.4% below CMP 4640.50 — proper trail-gap. Strong sector + Q4 earnings momentum. Let it run toward 4900 target. Re-evaluate on >+4% unrealized."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +8.33% post Q4 (PAT +156%, revenue +37%). Strong setup BUT stock at all-time-18-year-high, P/E ~224, extended. CMP 381.75 vs SMA20 305 = 25% above. Chase entry into vertical move with VIX rising = poor R:R. Pass; await pullback to ~358-362 zone (prior resistance turned support) for better entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Gapped +14.3% on Q4 but PAT actually -15% YoY (margin compression). Move is sentiment/upgrade-driven, not earnings-driven. Upper-circuit gap = one-sided liquidity, hard to size SL properly. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATATECH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong (+22% rev, margin expansion) but Motilal sees 15% downside, IT sector down 25% YTD on AI disruption. Stock gapped +10%; chasing into a beaten sector with valid bear thesis is poor R:R. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "VEDL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.30,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Demerger restructuring noise, ex-demerger fall ~64%, promoter pledge 56% encumbered, dividend policy weakened. Governance/structural overhangs are exactly what Rule 13 flags. Hard pass regardless of price action."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 solid, full-year PAT +148%. Stock at ATH 1175 but dividend record date May 8 (3 sessions away — binary-ish event). Per Rule 11, new entries within 3 sessions of catalyst should be event-trade size only. Better to wait for post-record-date pullback than chase ATH at 62x forward. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "FLUOROCHEM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results May 13 (within 6 sessions, approaching binary window). UBS Sell, soft Q3 (-19% PAT), P/E 70x. Pre-results entry against bearish broker view = poor R:R. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ADANIGREEN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already hold ADANIPORTS (Adani-cluster exposure). SEC civil fraud + DOJ overhang are unresolved governance issues per Rule 13. Adding second Adani name with active US regulatory case is exactly what cluster + governance rules block. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already at ATH 7200 post-earnings. 7.7x volume with only +1.11% move signals distribution-grade churn at the highs. Citi Sell at 6500. Pass — chase risk too high."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong (+125% PAT, net cash) but Realty sector -1.66% today, gap from 1577 high to 1483 CMP = -6% intraday fade on results day. Wide intraday range suggests one-sided liquidity. P/E ~80x. Pass; revisit on consolidation."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1029 already locks +4.5%, sits 2% below CMP. Proper trail."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Down -2.6% but thesis intact (gold at records on geopolitical risk). SL 119 holds."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1710 = +0.6% locked, 1.7% below CMP. ATH momentum + Q4 strength; let it run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 13400 sits just 0.3% below CMP — accept the tight stop as designed; record sales thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 204 flush with CMP; banking weak today. Hold to SL trip or rebound; Q4 turnaround thesis still valid."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 4575 = breakeven, 1.4% below CMP. Defence sector strong; let it work toward 4900."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHEL — wait for pullback to 358-365 (prior resistance turned support) for swing entry; Q4 fundamentals justify a position at better R:R. LAURUSLABS — revisit after May 8 dividend record date if pullback materializes. NAVINFLUOR — watch for breakout retest above 6900 with volume confirmation. SOBHA — let post-result volatility settle, revisit at 1430-1450 support.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 34%, well below soft target — but VIX +2% with Nifty -0.72% is not the tape to force new entries on extended breakouts. Three of six held positions (MARUTI, BANDHANBNK, GOLDBEES) are at or near SL — meaningful daily-loss exposure if all trip together (~ -INR 3,800 combined). Three winners (PNBHOUSING, ADANIPORTS, HAL) already trailed to lock-in. Today's discipline: protect the book, don't add cluster/correlated risk on a weak-breadth day. If MARUTI/BANDHANBNK stop out cleanly, redeploy on next setup cycle."
}
